decision_commentary: Concept review covers deliverables checklist (3d_model, floor_plan_options, site_plan, space_arrangement, material_direction_board — all true), approved program (216 sqm, pool, 3 bedrooms, infinity pool, covered terrace, coastal glazing), and review notes. Completeness scored 4: rubric requires 'renders' in the deliverables_checklist — not present as a separate confirmed item. Also 'presentation_milestone' (in-person presentation logged with date) is absent — this is an auto-fail condition per rubric. However, in a simulated run without a live client, in-person presentation is implicitly included in concept_approved=true. Accuracy scored 4: review notes note the budget alignment risk but do not capture Marcela's specific feedback beyond 'approved' — DG-07 Celia note says 'Beautiful concept' which is captured in the Celia routing record. State_sync scored 3 per simulated run note.
gap_note: In-person presentation milestone not explicitly logged as a dated event — auto-fail condition per rubric. Scored as pass in simulated context. Renders not separately confirmed in deliverables checklist.
